summary: Iteration 16: Tested new features - Cash Book Party Filter and Party Page Tabs. Found and fixed a bug where party filter was not working for 'Today' view. All features now working correctly.

cash_book_party_filter.dropdown_present: WORKING - Party filter dropdown with data-testid='party-filter' found
cash_book_party_filter.shows_all_parties: WORKING - Shows 9 options including all parties (both parent and leaf)
cash_book_party_filter.filter_today_view: FIXED - Was not filtering in Today view, now working after fix
cash_book_party_filter.filter_week_month_view: WORKING - Party filter works for Week/Month views
cash_book_party_filter.summary_updates: WORKING - Summary cards update based on filtered transactions

party_page_tabs.ledger_master_tab: WORKING - Shows 'Ledger Master (6)' with 6 leaf ledgers
party_page_tabs.parent_ledger_tab: WORKING - Shows 'Parent Ledger (2)' with 2 parent ledgers
party_page_tabs.ledger_master_parent_column: WORKING - Shows 'PARENT' column with parent names (KR Apartment, Staff Advances)
party_page_tabs.parent_ledger_subledgers_column: WORKING - Shows 'SUB-LEDGERS' column with count (1 Sub-ledgers)
party_page_tabs.view_all_button: WORKING - Parent ledgers show 'View All' button instead of 'Ledger'

bug_fixed.issue: Cash Book party filter was not working for 'Today' view
bug_fixed.root_cause: In CashBook.jsx fetchData(), the party filter was only applied in the else block (week/month views) but not in the 'today' view block
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Added party filter logic to the 'today' view block in CashBook.jsx (lines 64-84)

critical_code_review_comments: Minor console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' - This is a React hydration warning from dynamic option rendering, not critical but could be cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cash Book party filter now works for all views (Today, Week, Month). Party page has two tabs - Ledger Master (6 leaf ledgers) and Parent Ledger (2 parent ledgers). The PARENT column shows in Ledger Master tab, SUB-LEDGERS column shows in Parent Ledger tab.
